one_shot_generation_prompt: Use the attached AULA WIN68 HE Max Version magnetic gaming keyboard product image as the strict product reference. Generate a Shopee Malaysia ecommerce listing image pack as six separate square 1:1 product images in one cohesive 2x3 contact sheet. Preserve the keyboard's visible identity: compact 60% layout, black and red gaming design, red RGB/backlight feel, black keycaps with red legends, left-side WIN68 HE branding area, USB-C wired gaming keyboard look. Do not change the keyboard layout, do not invent wireless/Bluetooth/battery features, do not add copyrighted game UI, esports team logos, fake certifications, fake accessories, or unrelated props. Create these six final-looking listing assets: 1. Clean cover main image on white or very light neutral background, full keyboard visible, no text. 2. Premium RGB hero on a dark gaming desk surface with cinematic red glow, no text. 3. Malaysia gaming desk lifestyle in a tidy modern apartment or bedroom setup, no copyrighted game content. 4. Hands-only in-use image with a generic adult model typing/gaming, no face and no clothing logos. 5. Feature infographic background with clean empty callout areas for Magnetic Switch, 8000Hz, Rapid Trigger, DKS, USB-C, and RGB labels to be added later; do not render long text. 6. Specification image background with measurement-line placeholders and clean specs-panel space, no fake dimensions or numbers. Style: premium ecommerce, sharp product detail, Shopee-ready, realistic commercial product photography, consistent black/red cyber esports visual language.
